import type { Theme } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";

export const kanagawaTheme: Theme = {
  border: {
    color: "#727169",
    focusColor: "#957fbb",
    style: "rounded",
  },
  colors: {
    accent: "#d27e99",
    accentForeground: "#1f1f28",
    background: "#1f1f28",
    border: "#727169",
    error: "#e82424",
    errorForeground: "#1f1f28",
    focusRing: "#957fbb",
    foreground: "#dcd7ba",
    info: "#76946a",
    infoForeground: "#1f1f28",
    muted: "#16161f",
    mutedForeground: "#727169",
    primary: "#7e9cd8",
    primaryForeground: "#1f1f28",
    secondary: "#292a3f",
    secondaryForeground: "#dcd7ba",
    selection: "#7e9cd8",
    selectionForeground: "#1f1f28",
    success: "#98bb6c",
    successForeground: "#1f1f28",
    warning: "#d7a657",
    warningForeground: "#1f1f28",
  },
  name: "kanagawa",
  spacing: {
    0: 0,
    1: 1,
    2: 2,
    3: 3,
    4: 4,
    6: 6,
    8: 8,
  },
  typography: {
    base: "",
    bold: true,
    lg: "bold",
    sm: "dim",
    xl: "bold",
  },
};
